label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when David could have gone to the football field. Let me start by going through all the information given step by step. First, we know that David woke up at 5am. So he's definitely up by then. Then, Steven saw David buying a phone at the electronics store from 5am to 6am. That means between 5 and 6, David was at the store. So he couldn't have been at the football field during that time. So option B (5am to 6am) is out because he was at the store. Next, Kimberly saw David taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 6am to 8am. Wait, the Leaning Tower of Pisa is in Italy, right? So if David was there taking photos from 6 to 8 am, he couldn't have been at the football field in the same location
